role.title: Client Success Manager (CSM)
role.organization_description: A B2B SaaS company providing fleet management software to mid-market logistics companies. Currently manages 140 enterprise accounts.

role_purpose: Ensure enterprise accounts achieve measurable value from the Vertex platform, retain and expand relationships, and serve as the primary escalation point for service and commercial issues.

compensation_context.note: This figure includes salary, benefits, overhead, and tooling costs.

reported_time_allocation.note: Based on time-tracking data from Q4 2025. CSMs self-report that the split should be inverted for them to do their jobs well.
